topics.name: Military Activity
topics.query: (military exercise OR troop deployment OR airstrike OR "naval exercise") sourcelang:eng

topics.name: Cyber Threats
topics.query: (cyberattack OR ransomware OR hacking OR "data breach" OR APT) sourcelang:eng
topics.description: Cyber attacks, ransomware, and digital threats

topics.name: Nuclear
topics.query: (nuclear OR uranium enrichment OR IAEA OR "nuclear weapon" OR plutonium) sourcelang:eng

topics.name: Sanctions
topics.query: (sanctions OR embargo OR "trade war" OR tariff OR "economic pressure") sourcelang:eng

topics.name: Intelligence
topics.query: (espionage OR spy OR intelligence agency OR covert OR surveillance) sourcelang:eng

topics.name: Maritime Security
topics.query: (naval blockade OR piracy OR "strait of hormuz" OR "south china sea" OR warship) sourcelang:eng
